runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI peak-load regression recheck on v8.11.128
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_DHdZWyaDQmUoS8sWbivAHX7rFbso is Ready and aliased to https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version reports v8.11.128, commit 86eca846646f85527cc299096bff9c4d8a2e5dff, and release pipeline 2516275363
Dashboard guest flow opened the AI sidebar with AI engine status Ready
Natural Korean peak-load query returned a substantive answer with peak time 2026-05-10 03:50, load1 value 16.58, and top servers db-mysql-dc1-primary, db-mysql-dc1-replica, api-was-dc1-01
Compact whole-fleet query '24h 기준 load1 peak가 언제였고 어떤 서버가 가장 영향을 줬어?' did not trigger clarification and returned peak time, load1 value, top average, and top server evidence
AI network requests returned 200/201 for /api/ai/wake-up, /api/ai/jobs, /api/ai/jobs/:id/stream, and /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2
Browser console reported 0 warnings and 0 errors
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost; this run targeted the previously failing peak-load phrasing family
Core route pack beyond landing-to-dashboard guest flow

expertAssessments.rationale: The previously failing peak-load phrasing family returned substantive metric-grounded answers for both natural Korean and compact 24h/load1/peak whole-fleet prompts without clarification blocking.
The production deployment is Ready, /api/version matches v8.11.128, AI paths returned HTTP 200/201, and Vercel usage remains within the expected no-billed-usage guardrail.
The run used the real Vercel UI flow and captured structured network/result/console evidence while avoiding broad live LLM repetition.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after targeted AI peak-load QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

completedImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant 24시간 피크 부하 질의가 phrasing-sensitive routing/evidence drift를 보임
completedImprovements.note: Rechecked on v8.11.128. Natural Korean and compact 24h/load1/peak whole-fleet queries returned peak time, load1 value, and top server evidence without clarification blocking.

notes: This QA confirms the current v8.11.128 production behavior, not the later f2e63badf semantic query routing Phase 3 commit, which is not deployed yet.

Visible assistant metadata still reports the generic conversation path on v8.11.128; the user-facing regression is closed, while the newer semantic metadata routing remains a deploy-follow-up if desired.
